name: Our 5-Step Placement Process
description: A structured 5-step process designed to make you industry-ready and land your dream job.

step.name: Skill Building
step.text: Gain highly sought-after industry skills with live projects.

step.name: Resume Preparation
step.text: Get resume polishing with expert reviews tailored for HRs.

step.name: Mock Interviews
step.text: Practice rigorously with technical and HR mock interview rounds.

step.name: Job Referrals
step.text: Gain direct exclusive referrals to over 50 hiring partners.

step.name: Placement
step.text: Receive the final offer letter and embark on your tech career.
